commit.subject: LU-11607 tests: Reproducer sanity
commit.message:
LU-11607 tests: Reproducer sanity

We are trying to reproduce an issue where testing
exists when it hits a failure for sanity test 103b
and other tests that have memory leak detection enabled
and a command returns a non zero status.
